County Superintendent of Schools
Watkins lett today for Spangle on a
visit to the schools of that section OF
the county On Saturday he will be
IN attendance at the teachers asso-
citation for the Spangle district Be
fore leaving Spokane Superintendent
Watkins gave out the following pro-
gram for the association meeting to be
held in the courthouse on the Goth
inst:


First Year in School: "What It
Should DO for the Child Milton
Todd; "School Discipline" Jesse Bur
nett; Vocal Music in the School. -
c. NJ. Rasmussen; Relations of Teach
en- and Parent" Maggie Halsell; Desk.
work for Children Rose Carr;
County Institute from the Teachers
Standpoint Mrs. Callie Olson;
phelps and His Teachers Superin-
tendent Watkins.
